pagination.mechanism: Click element with class 'show-more more-results' and text 'Visa fler' within the 'Övrigt anslagen information' section

requires_subpages.reason: All relevant data is embedded inline in the HTML via AngularJS data attributes on the listing page itself. Each item's metadata (title, doctype, object_link, diary_name, contains_files) is encoded in the board-details td[item] attribute as JSON. Detail fields (anslaget från/till, handläggare, ankomstdatum) are loaded dynamically via Angular on click but the core identifiers are already in the DOM.

selectors_hint.case_number: td[board-details][template='3'] parsed from item attribute: object_link d-parameter (e.g. d=158482)
selectors_hint.address: td[board-item][template='3'] p.ng-binding (title text contains fastighet and address)
selectors_hint.date: parsed from item JSON attribute: title text often contains date range

data_source_notes: Page is a full AngularJS SPA. Data is rendered client-side. Each item in 'Övrigt anslagen information' has doctype=4, type='Handling', diary_name='STBYGG' (bygglov) or 'MILJO' (miljö). Item metadata is JSON-encoded in the attribute item='...' on td[board-details]. The object_link field contains diary reference: ?t=4&d=<id>&n=<diary>. API endpoint is likely https://anslagstavla.helsingborg.se/api/ - worth inspecting network traffic to find direct JSON endpoint.
filter_hint: Target items where diary_name='STBYGG' for bygglov, or where title contains 'Kungörelse' or 'bygglov' (case-insensitive). Exclude protocol entries (doctype=128).
notes: AngularJS single-page app rendered at https://anslagstavla.helsingborg.se/#!/billboard/. Bygglov-ärenden appear in the 'Övrigt anslagen information' section as type=Handling, doctype=4, diary_name=STBYGG. Titles follow pattern 'Kungörelse bygglovsärende - FASTIGHET (GATUADRESS) - åtgärd'. A Selenium/Playwright scraper is required since content is JavaScript-rendered. Recommend intercepting XHR/fetch API calls on page load to find the underlying REST API endpoint, which would be more reliable than DOM scraping. The 'Visa fler' load-more button must be clicked repeatedly to retrieve all current postings.
